name: create_sheet_metal_part_from_prototype
description: Create a sheet-metal part from the installed sheet-metal part prototype, set Title, save, reopen, and verify.

args.source_path: absolute .grb prototype path, optional; category default is used when omitted
args.prototype_id: catalog id, optional; category default is used when omitted
args.property_name: writable string DocumentProperties property name; defaults to Title
args.text_value: new property text; category default is used when omitted
